title: LoopCraft
body:
# How to start the loops:
### !!!You'll need commands on!!!
Create a world and use the command **/function time:setup**. As the name says it will set up everything you'll need

Then start the mod by using the command **/function time:start**, and stop anytime with the **/function time:stop** command

Want to confirm that everything is working? use the command **/scoreboard players add loop timers 6000**. This will force a loop!

**Relogging into the world will make all replays dissapear**, and you'll need to wait for it to enter a loop again for you to see your replays. Or use the command above ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ (every single one will appear, you wont lose a replay by relogging)

For now **only works with singleplayer**

### !!Using liquids, like a bucket of water/lava, is a little glitchy and i would not recommend!!

# A modpack made for fun. 

Enter a timeloop every 5 minutes, alone or with friends! And try to play with your past self doing things that you did before. Getting caotic over time, and making things harder and harder to do, even building a house

[Modpack inspired by this video i watched](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i602-oh0a0c)
